name: coding_linteral
description: Local coding-practice trainer with LLM-generated lessons and deterministic checks.

scripts.start: npm install && npm run build && npm run runtime:default && node server.mjs
scripts.start:local: npm install && npm run build && npm run runtime:all && JUDGE0_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:2358 node server.mjs
scripts.runtime:memory: docker compose -f docker-compose.workspace.yml up falkordb graph-memory
scripts.runtime:default: docker compose -f docker-compose.workspace.yml stop judge0-server judge0-worker judge0-db judge0-redis && docker compose -f docker-compose.workspace.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans falkordb graph-memory
scripts.runtime:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.workspace.yml up -d --build --remove-orphans falkordb graph-memory judge0-db judge0-redis judge0-server judge0-worker
scripts.test: node tests/self-check.mjs && node tests/persistence-api-check.mjs && node tests/chat-tool-loop-check.mjs && node tests/chat-stream-check.mjs && node tests/coding-task-check.mjs && python3 tests/memory-service-check.py
